subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out. We're open to exploring potential synergies between our teams.

Would any of the following slots work for an introductory call?
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which works best for you.

Regarding your request for internal contact details, we don't share direct contact information. Please visit our public website for general inquiries and appropriate contact channels.

Best regards
